title: Tenant-bound SaaS governance visualization for platform change sets
implemented: The sovereign platform route renders an explicit JRN-040 governance visualization before the detailed platform dashboard.
The visualization reads the authenticated ActorIdentity tenantId and never hardcodes a tenant selector or X-Tenant-ID override.
Lifecycle metrics are derived from the live typed platform-control change-set controller rather than fixtures or local arrays.
The complete governed lifecycle is visualized: draft, validated, submitted, approved, applied and rolled_back.
Loading, permission-denied, error, retry, refresh and empty/live-zero states are represented without demo fallbacks.
The focused JRN-040 TypeScript configuration includes the new component.
A permanent Node source-contract test verifies tenant binding, typed API use, lifecycle coverage and absence of direct fetch or bypass mutations.
